user_query:
I’m setting up an accountability coach that alternates between savage roasts and genuine encouragement, but it must never be actually hurtful and should automatically soften if I’m struggling. Please do the following:

1) Read my configuration and recent activity:
- input/config.json — mode, base intensity, check-in times, custom coach name
- input/activity.json — 7-day activity log (quests completed, streak, level, missed)

2) Generate the exact messages this coach would have sent for each of those 7 days — two per day:
- Morning check-in (scheduled at the configured morning time)
- Evening review (scheduled at the configured evening time)

3) Apply these rules precisely:
- Mode is savage, but never be cruel: mix wit with acknowledgment; no slurs, insults, or harmful language.
- Use the provided custom coach name in every message.
- Keep each message between 80 and 320 characters.
- If there are 2 or more consecutive missed days at that point in the log, automatically tone down for those days: mark toned_down=true and reduce intensity_used to 5 or below.
- In savage mode, when the prior day had 1+ completed quests, include at least one backhanded compliment while still acknowledging effort (set includes_backhanded_compliment=true and acknowledges_effort=true).
- Always set acknowledges_effort=true; the tone should motivate, not demoralize.
- Use the configured times exactly in the output: morning uses morning_checkin from config, evening uses evening_review.

4) Write two outputs:
- output/messages.jsonl — exactly 14 JSON lines (2 per day) with this schema per line:
  {
    "date": "YYYY-MM-DD",               // day this message belongs to
    "type": "morning" | "evening",      // which kind
    "time": "HH:MM",                    // must match config times per type
    "mode": "savage",                   // copied from config
    "custom_name": "Coach Rekt",        // copied from config
    "base_intensity": 8,                 // copied from config
    "intensity_used": 1-10,              // after any automatic tone-down
    "toned_down": true|false,            // true when 2+ consecutive missed days
    "yesterday_quests": number,          // derived from the log
    "miss_streak": number,               // consecutive missed days up to this day
    "includes_backhanded_compliment": true|false,
    "acknowledges_effort": true,         // must always be true
    "message": "string"                 // 80–320 chars; witty but not cruel; must include the custom coach name
  }
- output/summary.md — a short explanation (<= 400 words) describing how you:
  - Interpreted the config
  - Detected any consecutive missed days and applied tone-down logic
  - Ensured backhanded compliments only when yesterday_quests > 0
  - Kept roasts clever but safe, always acknowledging effort

Safety notes:
- Do not use words like "worthless", "idiot", "stupid", "failure", "hate", "pathetic", "hopeless", "dumb", "trash", "useless", or anything violent.
- Keep the humor sharp but humane, and lighten automatically on rough streaks.

Please begin by reading both files under input/ and write only to the two specified paths under output/.
